modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Receiving notifications about potential course drop due to inactivity

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing issues with receiving notifications regarding their course status. They have been alerted through emails and text messages indicating that they may be dropped from the course due to a lack of login activity. This situation is causing concern about their enrollment in the Distance Learning program on Desire2Learn.
